FHS 121 (Apr 2024)
目的聲明
家庭健康服務
收集資料的目的
1. 衞生署向病人及服務使用者提供服務和進行其他有關活動時，病
人或服務使用者會提供個人資料。衞生署會使用這些個人資料作以下
用途：
a) 資格證明；
b) 提供服務，包括但不限於臨牀診症、診症預約及通知約期，
以及顧客關係事宜；
c) 測試結果／化驗／檢驗／治療的記錄，以繼續提供護理，或
供其他醫療專業人員參考；
d) 同意進行特定治療／測試；
e) 開支會計；
f) 進行流行病學監測及調查疑似傳染病爆發個案；
g) 為公共衞生目的，就結核病或其他須予報告／呈報的疾病，
作出呈報；
h) 追踪不依期覆診者，以便跟進／治療；
i) 評估是否需要社會援助；
j) 在法律程序中作為參考；
k) 登記／管理的記錄；
l) 供製備統計數字、進行研究或教學用途；
m) 服務／人力發展與策劃；
n) 利便籌辦與健康教育及社區聯絡有關的活動；以及
o) 到訪／查詢／投訴的記錄。
提供個人資料，純屬自願。如你未能提供足夠資料，我們可能無法證
明你符合資格享用某項服務或參加某些活動，因而不能為你提供服務
╱協助；又或即使仍可提供服務或協助，你也須按非符合資格人士的
收費率 (通常較高 )繳費。
資料承轉人類別
2. 你所提供的個人資料，主要供本署內部使用，但如有需要，也可
能為上文第 1 段所述目的，向其他政府決策局╱部門、醫院管理局或
有關各方披露。此外，只有在你同意作出該項披露或該項披露是《個
(Rev Sep 2025)
人資料 (私隱)條例》所允許的情況下，本署才會向有關方面披露有關
資料。
查閱個人資料
3. 根據《個人資料 (私隱)條例》第 18 及第 22 條，以及附表 1 第 6
原則的規定，你有權查閱和改正你的個人資料。你的查閱權包括有權
索取你在上文第 1 段所述情況下所提供個人資料的複本一份。為依從
查閱資料要求，可能會徵收費用。
查詢
4. 有關所提供個人資料的查詢(包括查閱和改正資料)，應送交：
a) 所屬母嬰健康院的顧客關係主任；或
b) 衞生署家庭健康服務
地址：香港灣仔愛群道 32 號愛群商業大廈 13 樓 1308 室
(Rev Sep 2025)
STATEMENT OF PURPOSES
Family Health Service
Purpose of Collection
1. The personal data are provided by patients and clients with whom the Department of Health
(‘DH’) interacts in the delivery of services, and other related activities. The personal data
provided will be used by DH for the following purposes:-
a) Proof of eligibility;
b) Providing services including but not limited to clinical service, appointment arrangement
and notification and client relation matters;
c) Record of test results / examination / investigation / treatment for continuation of care or
reference by other medical professionals;
d) Consent for particular treatments / tests;
e) Accounting of expenses;
f) Epidemiological surveillance and suspected outbreak investigation;
g) For notification of tuberculosis or other diseases reportable / notifiable for public health
purposes;
h) Tracing defaulters for follow up / treatment;
i) Assessment for social assistance;
j) For reference in legal proceedings;
k) Record of enrolment / management;
l) For preparing statistics, carrying out research or teaching purpose;
m) For services / manpower development and planning;
n) To facilitate organisation of activities related to health education and community liaison; and
o) Record of visits / enquiries / complaints.
The provision of personal data is voluntary. If you do not provide sufficient information, we may not
be able to prove your eligibility for specific service / activities and cannot provide service / assistance
to you or even the service / assistance may still be provided, you will be charged at the non-entitled
person (usually higher) rate.
Classes of Transferees
2. The personal data you provide are mainly for use within DH but they may also be disclosed to
other Government bureaux / departments, the Hospital Authority or relevant parties for the
purposes mentioned in paragraph 1 above, if required. Apart from this, the data may only be
disclosed to parties where you have given consent to such disclosure or where such disclosure
is allowed under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance.
Access to Personal Data
3. You have a right of access and correction with respect to personal data as provided for in sections
18 and 22 and Principle 6 of Schedule 1 of the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance. Your right
of access includes the right to obtain a copy of your personal data provided by you during the
occasions as mentioned in paragraph 1 above. A fee may be imposed for complying with a data
access request.
Enquiries
4. Enquiries concerning the personal data provided, including the making of access and corrections,
should be addressed to:
a) The Client Relations Officer of respective centre; or
(Rev Sep 2025)
b) Family Health Service, Department of Health
Rm 1308, 13th Floor, Guardian House, 32 Oi Kwan Road, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
(Rev Sep 2025)

收集資料的目的
1. 衞生署向病人及服務使用者提供服務和進行其他有關活動時，病
人或服務使用者會提供個人資料。衞生署會使用這些個人資料作以下
用途：
a) 資格證明；
b) 提供服務，包括但不限於臨牀診症、診症預約及通知約期，
以及顧客關係事宜；
c) 測試結果／化驗／檢驗／治療的記錄，以繼續提供護理，或
供其他醫療專業人員參考；
d) 同意進行特定治療／測試；
e) 開支會計；
f) 進行流行病學監測及調查疑似傳染病爆發個案；
g) 為公共衞生目的，就結核病或其他須予報告／呈報的疾病，
作出呈報；
h) 追踪不依期覆診者，以便跟進／治療；
i) 評估是否需要社會援助；
j) 在法律程序中作為參考；
k) 登記／管理的記錄；
l) 供製備統計數字、進行研究或教學用途；
m) 服務／人力發展與策劃；
n) 利便籌辦與健康教育及社區聯絡有關的活動；以及
o) 到訪／查詢／投訴的記錄。
提供個人資料，純屬自願。如你未能提供足夠資料，我們可能無法證
明你符合資格享用某項服務或參加某些活動，因而不能為你提供服務
╱協助；又或即使仍可提供服務或協助，你也須按非符合資格人士的
收費率 (通常較高 )繳費。

/ / / / /
本人 吾等完全明白本人 吾等必須持續繳付保費才能享有持續保障。若本人 吾等不繳付到期的保費，本人 吾等將失去保障。本人
/
吾等明白，適用於部分保險產品並受限於保單的條款，在保費繳付期內，保費率可能隨受保人年齡改變及 或宏利可能有權不時調整保費
/ / /
率，而調整後的保費率可能超出本人 吾等於本表格的第三部分中所提供有關本人 吾等繳付保費的能力及意願的資料並且本人 吾等
/ / / /
可能因此無法負擔。在此情況下，如果本人 吾等未能支付到期的保費，本人 吾等將失去所需的保障。本人 吾等明白本人 吾等應從
/ / / /
本人 吾等可動用收入及 或流動資產中預留合適的比例，以維持在任何保費上漲情況下本人 吾等支付保費的能力。另外，本人 吾等確認如
/ / /
保費繳付期超出本人 吾等的目標退休年齡而本人 吾等希望於退休後仍能繼續獲得該建議保單的保障，本人 吾等應預留足夠的資金以支付
退休後所需的保費。

Every reference in this declaration to:
於本聲明內提及的:
• “Original Coverage” means the coverage offering the Cover-Me-Again option that is being exercised.
「原有保障」指提供有關之備用保障權益之保障。
• “New Coverage” means the coverage issued under the exercise of the Cover-Me-Again option.
「新保障」指根據行使有關之備用保障權益所發出之保障。
• “Prior Coverage” means the coverage offering the Cover-Me-Again option that was exercised for the issuance of the Original Coverage, if the
Original Coverage was issued under the exercise of a Cover-Me-Again option.
「最初保障」指提供備用保障權益以發出原有保障之保障，如原有保障為行使備用保障權益而發出的。
• “Preceding Critical Illness / Illnesses” refers to the Critical Illness / Illnesses on which Critical Illness Benefit(s) was / were paid for the Original
Coverage or Prior Coverage, if any.
「之前的危疾」指於原有保障或最初保障（如適用）之下曾作危疾賠償賠付之危疾。

• If any of the Preceding Critical Illness / Illnesses fall into Group 1 as defined in the Original Coverage or Prior Coverage (if any), no
Critical Illness Benefit or Gender Specific Benefit will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness in Group 1 or 2 or on
Prostate Cancer and Testicular Cancer defined in the New Coverage if the first diagnosis of such Critical Illness or Gender Specific
Disease is made before the end of a 5-year Cancer-free period, as defined below, following the latest of all last completion dates of
treatments of Preceding Critical Illness / Illnesses from Group 1 as defined in the Original Coverage or Prior Coverage (if any).
5-year Cancer-free Period must be confirmed by the Insured’s treating Specialist Medical Practitioner(s) for the whole period of the
last 5-year period supported by clinical, radiological, histological and laboratory evidence and evidence of all other relevant
investigative methods available at that time, to confirm the cancer-free state. The 5-year Cancer-free Period shall start from the date
of completion of treatment of cancer, which shall include any surgery, chemotherapy, radiation therapy, immunotherapy, monoclonal
antibody therapy or other conventional cancer treatments that have been used as prescribed by the Insured’s treating Specialist
Medical Practitioner(s).
如任何之前的危疾來自原有保障或最初保障（如適用）所界定的類別一，本公司不會就來自新保障所界定之類別一或二之危疾或
前列腺癌或睪丸癌支付新保障之在生利益賠償或男性及女性疾病賠償，如該危疾或男性及女性疾病的首次診斷於下列定義之「五
年無癌症期」完結前發生，而「五年無癌症期」將根據所有來自原有保障或最初保障（如適用）所界定的類別一的之前的危疾之
最後療程完畢日起計算。
「五年無癌症期」必須由受保人之相關主診專科醫生在整個五年期內以臨床、放射學、組織學、實驗室檢驗報告及所有在當
時已有的其他有關查證方法作依據，以證明過去五年內沒有任何癌症徵狀。「五年無癌症期」是癌症療程完畢日起計算。療
程包括任何手術、化療、電療、免疫療法、單克隆抗體療法或其他由主診專科醫生指定的慣常癌症療法。
• If any of the Preceding Critical Illness / Illnesses fall into Group 1 as defined in the Original Coverage or Prior Coverage (if any), no
Gender Specific Benefit will be payable under the New Coverage for carcinoma-in-situ of breast, cervix uteri, uterus, ovary, fallopian tube
or vagina as defined in the New Coverage.
如任何之前的危疾來自原有保障或最初保障（如適用）所界定的類別一，本公司不會就乳房、子宮頸、子宮、卵巢、輸卵管或陰
道原位癌支付新保障之男性及女性疾病賠償。
• If any of the Preceding Critical Illness / Illnesses fall into Group 2, 3, 4 or 5 as defined in the Original Coverage or Prior Coverage (if any),
no Critical Illness Benefit will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness in the same group defined in the New Coverage.
如任何之前的危疾來自原有保障或最初保障（如適用）所界定的類別二、三、四或五，本公司不會就同一類別之危疾支付新保
障之危疾賠償。
• If any of the Preceding Critical Illness / Illnesses fall into Group 3 as defined in the Original Coverage or Prior Coverage (if any), no
Angioplasty Benefit will be payable under the New Coverage.
如任何之前的危疾來自原有保障或最初保障（如適用）所界定的類別三，本公司不會於新保障支付血管成形術賠償。
• The claim amount payable for Death Benefit under the New Coverage will be reduced by 50% if the date of death is within the first 12
months from the issue date or the policy year date of the New Coverage, whichever is later. After the Company pays the Death Benefit, the
New Coverage shall, without prejudice to any other termination or settlement provision, terminate with no further benefit payable by the
Company.
如受保人在新保障的簽發日或保單生效日後（以較後者為準）的首12個月內身故，本公司將賠償身故賠償額的50%。本公司給
予身故賠償後，在不影響任何其他保單終止或收款規定的原則下，新保障將會自動終止，而本公司亦不會再作出任何賠償。
• The claim amount payable for Living Benefits under the New Coverage will be reduced by 50% if the diagnosis of that Critical Illness,
Juvenile Disease or Gender Specific Illness, or the performance of Angioplasty Procedure is within the first 12 months from the issue date
or the policy year date of the New Coverage, whichever is later. After the Company pays the Critical Illness Benefit, the New Coverage
shall, without prejudice to any other termination or settlement provision, terminate with no further benefit payable by the Company.
如受保人在新保障的簽發日或保單生效日後（以較後者為準）的首 12 個月內被診斷證實患上危疾、兒童疾病或男性及女性疾
病，或進行血管成形術及相關治療，本公司將賠償該項危疾、兒童疾病或男性及女性疾病，或血管成形術及相關治療的在生利
益賠償額 50%。在本公司給予危疾賠償後，在不影響任何其他保單終止或收款規定的原則下，新保障將會自動終止，而本公司
亦不會再作出任何賠償。
• If the policyowner or life insured is excluded or restricted in any manner under the Original Coverage from claiming for or receiving any
benefit or any part thereof due to or in any event related to any illness/ sickness/ injury/ disability/ medical treatment and/ or any
complications or diseases related thereto in respect of the life insured, all these illness/ sickness/ injury/ disability/ medical treatment and/
or any complications or diseases related thereto shall in respect of the life insured remain excluded or restricted from any coverage/ benefit
under the New Coverage.
倘若保單持有人或受保人因任何病患／疾病／傷病／傷殘／治療及／或因此而導致的任何併發症或疾病而遭拒絕或限制接受原
有保障的任何保障或賠償，新保障將仍然拒絕或限制為此等所有與受保人有關之病患／疾病／傷病／傷殘／治療及／或因此而
導致的任何併發症或疾病提供保障／賠償。

CUSTOMER’S DECLARATION
客戶聲明
Every reference in this declaration to:
於本聲明內提及的﹕
• “Original Coverage” means the coverage offering the Cover-Me-Again option that is being exercised.
「原有保障」指提供有關之備用保障權益之保障。
• “New Coverage” means the coverage issued under the exercise of the Cover-Me-Again option.
「新保障」指根據行使有關之備用保障權益所發出之保障。
• “Prior Coverage” means the coverage offering the Cover-Me-Again option that was exercised for the issuance of the Original Coverage, if
the Original Coverage was issued under the exercise of a Cover-Me-Again option.
「最初保障」指提供備用保障權益以發出原有保障之保障，如原有保障為行使備用保障權益而發出的。
• “Preceding Critical Illness / Illnesses” refers to the Critical Illness / Illnesses on which Critical Illness Benefit(s) was / were paid for the
Original Coverage or Prior Coverage, if any.
「之前的危疾」指於原有保障或最初保障（如適用）之下曾作危疾賠償賠付之危疾。
I, being the policyowner of the New Coverage, hereby declare that I understand and agree to the following:
本人（新保障之保單持有人）謹此聲明本人明白及同意下列條款﹕
PARTICULARS
詳情
In consideration for the exercise of Cover-Me-Again option, the Provision of the New Coverage shall be issued with the following amendments:
當行使有關之備用保障權益時，新保障的條款將加入以下修訂﹕
• No Living Benefits will be payable under the New Coverage for “Terminal Illness” and “Total and Permanent Disability”.
本公司不會就「末期疾病」及「完全及永久傷殘」支付新保障之在生利益賠償。
• The Life Insured must survive 28 days or the period stipulated in the New Coverage(s), whichever is longer, following the diagnosis of
Critical Illness covered under the New Coverage(s) before any benefit with respect to which is payable.
受保人在被診斷證實患上新保障包括的危疾之日起計的首28天內或新保障指定的期限（以較長者為準），必須仍然在世，本公
司方會支付有關賠償。
• Critical Illness Benefits payable under the Original Coverage, Prior Coverage (if any) and the New Coverage(s) shall fall under different
groups of Critical Illness as defined in the Original Coverage(s). Critical Illness Benefit shall be payable only ONCE within each group
except for Group 1.
原有保障、最初保障（如適用）及新保障所獲得的危疾保障必須來自有保障內列明的不同類別危疾。除第一類別外，每一類別的
危疾保障只可獲得一次賠償。

• “Preceding Claim” shall be defined as the claim paid for the Critical Illness Benefit under preceding Original Coverage(s) and Prior
Coverage (if any). For any eligible claim payment for Critical Illness or Gender Specific Disease on New Coverage(s) (“Subsequent
Claim”), the first diagnosis of such Critical Illness must be made after a 5-year Cancer-free Period, as defined below, following the last
completion date of treatment of Critical Illness from Group 1 for which the Preceding Claim(s) was payable, if any of the Preceding
Claim(s) was from Group 1 and the Subsequent Claim is from Group 1 or 2 or on Prostate Cancer and Testicular Cancer.
5-year Cancer-free Period must be confirmed by the Insured’s treating Specialist Medical Practitioner(s) for the whole period of the
last 5-year period supported by clinical, radiological, histological and laboratory evidence and evidence of all other relevant
investigative methods available at that time, to confirm the cancer-free state. The 5-year Cancer-free Period shall start from the date
of completion of treatment of cancer, which shall include any surgery, chemotherapy, radiation therapy, immunotherapy, monoclonal
antibody therapy or other conventional cancer treatments that have been used as prescribed by the Insured’s treating Specialist
Medical Practitioner(s).
「之前保單的索償」是指已在原有保障及最初保障（如適用）獲得之危疾賠償。若之前保單的索償是來自類別一，任何在新保障
的合資格的危疾或男性及女性疾病索償（「其後保單的索償」）如來自類別一或二前列腺癌或睪丸癌，該危疾的首次診斷必須於
下列定義之「五年無癌症期」後發生，而「五年無癌症期」將根據已獲賠償的癌症療程完畢日起計算。
「五年無癌症期」必須由受保人之相關主診專科醫生在整個五年期內以臨床、放射學、組織學、實驗室檢驗報告及所有在
當時已有的其他有關查證方法作依據，以證明過去五年內沒有任何癌症徵狀。「五年無癌症期」是癌症療程完畢日起計
算。療程包括任何手術、化療、電療、免疫療法、單克隆抗體療法或其他由主診專科醫生指定的慣常癌症療法。
• The claim amount payable for Critical Illness, Gender Specific Illness, Juvenile Disease or Angioplasty Procedure under the New
Coverage(s) will be reduced by 50% if the diagnosis of that Critical Illness, Gender Specific Illness, Juvenile Disease or performance of
Angioplasty Procedure is within the first 12 months from the issue date or the policy year date of the New Coverage, whichever is later.
After the Company pays the Critical Illness Benefit, the New Coverage(s) will be terminated with no further liability on the part of the
Company.
如受保人在新保障的簽發日或保單生效日後（以較後者為準）的首12個月內被診斷證實患上危疾、男性及女性疾病、兒童疾病或
已進行血管成形術及相關治療，本公司將給予危疾賠償、兒童疾病賠償、男性及女性疾病賠償或血管成形術賠償之50%。如本公
司已給予危疾賠償，新保障亦告終止，而本公司將會同時免除任何責任。
• No death benefit will be payable under the New Coverage.
本公司不會於新保障支付身故賠償。
• No Angioplasty Benefit will be payable from the New Coverage(s) if any of the Preceding Claim(s) was from Group 3. No Gender Specific
Benefit on carcinoma-in-situ of breast, cervix uteri, uterus, ovary, fallopian tube or vagina will be payable from the New Coverage(s) if any
of the Preceding Claim(s) was from Group 1.
若之前保單的索償是來自類別三，本公司不會支付新保障之血管成形術賠償。若之前保單的索償是來自類別一，本公司不會支付
新保障就乳房、子宮頸、子宮、卵巢、輸卵管或陰道原位癌之男性及女性疾病賠償。
• No benefit will be payable for any exclusion(s) as specified in the New Coverage(s) and/or endorsement and the letter of acceptance signed
and accepted by the Life Insured and/or Policyowner.
本公司不會就新保障及／或批註，以及受保人及／或保單持有人簽署作實的接納書中指明的不受保項目支付賠償。
• The New Coverage(s) available for this option will be determined by the Company at the time when this option is exercised and it will be
issued in the form of and subject to the conditions then normally in use by the Company and at the relevant tabular rate of premium then
employed by the Company. The premium will be calculated on the same terms of acceptance as those used by the Company for the
calculation of similar policy/policies.
本公司將於受保人行使本權益時決定所適用的新保障，而新保障將按本公司慣用的方式及條件簽發，並按本公司當時採用的保費
表收取保費，而保費將根據本公司就相似保單採用的方法計算。
• Inflation Protection Option (“IPO”) will not be available to the New Coverage(s).
「通脹加保權益」條款將不適用於新保障。
• If the policyowner or life insured is excluded or restricted in any manner under the Original Coverage or Prior Coverage (if any) from
claiming for or receiving any benefit or any part thereof due to or in any event related to any illness/ sickness/ injury/ disability/ medical
treatment and/ or any complications or diseases related thereto in respect of the life insured, all these illness/ sickness/ injury/ disability/
medical treatment and / or any complications or diseases related thereto shall in respect of the life insured remain excluded or restricted
from any coverage/ benefit under the New Coverage.
倘若保單持有人或受保人因任何病患／疾病／傷病／傷殘／治療及／或因此而導致的任何併發症或疾病而遭拒絕或限制接受原有
保障或最初保障（如適用）的任何保障或賠償，新保障將仍然拒絕或限制為此等所有與受保人有關之病患／疾病／傷病／傷殘／
治療及／或因此而導致的任何併發症或疾病提供保障／賠償。

of completion of treatment of cancer, which shall include any surgery, chemotherapy, radiation therapy, immunotherapy, monoclonal
antibody therapy or other conventional cancer treatments that have been used as prescribed by the Insured’s treating Specialist
Medical Practitioner(s).
「之前保單的索償」是指已在原有保障及最初保障（如適用）獲得之危疾賠償。若之前保單的索償是來自類別一，任何在新保障
的合資格的危疾或男性及女性疾病索償（「其後保單的索償」）如來自類別一或二前列腺癌或睪丸癌，該危疾的首次診斷必須於
下列定義之「五年無癌症期」後發生，而「五年無癌症期」將根據已獲賠償的癌症療程完畢日起計算。
「五年無癌症期」必須由受保人之相關主診專科醫生在整個五年期內以臨床、放射學、組織學、實驗室檢驗報告及所有在
當時已有的其他有關查證方法作依據，以證明過去五年內沒有任何癌症徵狀。「五年無癌症期」是癌症療程完畢日起計
算。療程包括任何手術、化療、電療、免疫療法、單克隆抗體療法或其他由主診專科醫生指定的慣常癌症療法。
• The claim amount payable for Critical Illness, Gender Specific Illness, Juvenile Disease or Angioplasty Procedure under the New
Coverage(s) will be reduced by 50% if the diagnosis of that Critical Illness, Gender Specific Illness, Juvenile Disease or performance of
Angioplasty Procedure is within the first 12 months from the issue date or the policy year date of the New Coverage, whichever is later.
After the Company pays the Critical Illness Benefit, the New Coverage(s) will be terminated with no further liability on the part of the
Company.
如受保人在新保障的簽發日或保單生效日後（以較後者為準）的首12個月內被診斷證實患上危疾、男性及女性疾病、兒童疾病或
已進行血管成形術及相關治療，本公司將給予危疾賠償、兒童疾病賠償、男性及女性疾病賠償或血管成形術賠償之50%。如本公
司已給予危疾賠償，新保障亦告終止，而本公司將會同時免除任何責任。
• If the Life Insured dies within the first 12 months from the issue date of the New Coverage(s), the Death Benefit under the New Coverage(s)
will be reduced by 50% and the New Coverage(s) will be terminated with no further liability on the part of the Company.
如受保人在新保障簽發日後的首12個月內身故，新保障的身故賠償額將按保障額遞減50%，而賠償後有關保單亦告終止。
• No Angioplasty Benefit will be payable from the New Coverage(s) if any of the Preceding Claim(s) was from Group 3. No Gender Specific
Benefit on carcinoma-in-situ of breast, cervix uteri, uterus, ovary, fallopian tube or vagina will be payable from the New Coverage(s) if any
of the Preceding Claim(s) was from Group 1.
若之前保單的索償是來自類別三，本公司不會支付新保障之血管成形術賠償。若之前保單的索償是來自類別一，本公司不會支付
新保障就乳房、子宮頸、子宮、卵巢、輸卵管或陰道原位癌之男性及女性疾病賠償。
• No benefit will be payable for any exclusion(s) as specified in the New Coverage(s) and/or endorsement and the letter of acceptance signed
and accepted by the Life Insured and/or Policyowner.
本公司不會就新保障及／或批註，以及受保人及／或保單持有人簽署作實的接納書中指明的不受保項目支付賠償。
• The New Coverage(s) available for this option will be determined by the Company at the time when this option is exercised and it will be
issued in the form of and subject to the conditions then normally in use by the Company and at the relevant tabular rate of premium then
employed by the Company. The premium will be calculated on the same terms of acceptance as those used by the Company for the
calculation of similar policy/policies.
本公司將於受保人行使本權益時決定所適用的新保障，而新保障將按本公司慣用的方式及條件簽發，並按本公司當時採用的保費
表收取保費，而保費將根據本公司就相似保單採用的方法計算。
• Inflation Protection Option (“IPO”) will not be available to the New Coverage(s).
「通脹加保權益」條款將不適用於新保障。

• No Living Benefits will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness or Gender Specific Illness which existed or the cause
or signs or symptoms of which existed before the date of endorsement or the effective date of the New Coverage, whichever is later.
本公司不會就新保障的批註日或新保障的生效日前（以較後者為準）已經存在的任何危疾或男性及女性疾病，或引致有關危疾
或男性及女性疾病的已存在成因、症狀或病徵支付在生利益賠償。

Coverage and related illnesses determined by the Company.
本公司不會就任何曾於原有保障提出索償的危疾或男性及女性疾病及本公司釐定的相關疾病支付在生利益賠償。

following the diagnosis of Critical Illness or Gender Specific Illness covered under the New Coverage before any benefit with respect to
which is payable.

必須仍然在世，本公司方會支付有關賠償。
• The claim amount payable for Living Benefits under the New Coverage will be reduced by 50% if the diagnosis of that Critical Illness or
Gender Specific Illness is within the first 12 months from the date of endorsement or the effective date of the New Coverage, whichever is
later. After the Company pays the Critical Illness Benefit on any Critical Illness other than “Angioplasty and Other Invasive Treatments for
Coronary Artery Disease”, the New Coverage shall, without prejudice to any other termination or settlement provision, terminate with no
further benefit payable by the Company.

客戶聲明
Every reference in this declaration to:
於本聲明內提及的:
• “Original Coverage” means the coverage offering the Cover-Me-Again option that is being exercised.
「原有保障」指提供有關之備用保障權益之保障。
• “New Coverage” means the coverage issued under the exercise of the Cover-Me-Again option.
「新保障」指根據行使有關之備用保障權益所發出之保障。
I, being the policyowner of the New Coverage, hereby declare that I understand and agree to the following:
本人﹝新保障之保單持有人﹞謹此聲明本人明白及同意下列條款：
PARTICULARS
詳情
In consideration for the exercise of Cover-Me-Again option, the Provision of the New Coverage shall be issued with the following amendments:
當行使有關之備用保障權益時，新保障的條款將加入以下修訂：
• No Living Benefits will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness, Juvenile Disease, Angioplasty Procedure or Gender
Specific Illness which existed or the cause or signs or symptoms of which existed before the issue date or the policy year date of the New
Coverage, whichever is later.
本公司不會就新保障的簽發日或保單生效日前（以較後者為準）已經存在的任何危疾、兒童疾病、血管成形術及相關治療，或
男性及女性疾病，或引致有關危疾、兒童疾病、血管成形術及相關治療，或男性及女性疾病的已存在成因、症狀或病徵支付在
生利益賠償。
• No Living Benefits will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness, Juvenile Disease, Angioplasty Procedure or Gender
Specific Illness claimed under the Original Coverage and related illnesses determined by the Company.
本公司不會就任何曾於原有保障提出索償的危疾、兒童疾病、血管成形術及相關治療，或男性及女性疾病及本公司釐定的相關
疾病支付在生利益賠償。
• The claim amount payable for Death Benefit under the New Coverage will be reduced by 50% if the date of death is within the first 12
months from the issue date or the policy year date of the New Coverage, whichever is later. After the Company pays the Death Benefit, the
New Coverage shall, without prejudice to any other termination or settlement provision, terminate with no further benefit payable by the
Company.
如受保人在新保障的簽發日或保單生效日後（以較後者為準）的首12個月內身故，本公司將賠償身故賠償額的50%。本公司給
予身故賠償後，在不影響任何其他保單終止或收款規定的原則下，新保障將會自動終止，而本公司亦不會再作出任何賠償。

• The claim amount payable for Living Benefits under the New Coverage will be reduced by 50% if the diagnosis of that Critical Illness,

or the policy year date of the New Coverage, whichever is later. After the Company pays the Critical Illness Benefit, the New Coverage
shall, without prejudice to any other termination or settlement provision, terminate with no further benefit payable by the Company.
如受保人在新保障的簽發日或保單生效日後（以較後者為準）的首 12 個月內被診斷證實患上危疾、兒童疾病或男性及女性疾
病，或進行血管成形術及相關治療，本公司將賠償該項危疾、兒童疾病或男性及女性疾病，或血管成形術及相關治療的在生利
益賠償額 50%。在本公司給予危疾賠償後，在不影響任何其他保單終止或收款規定的原則下，新保障將會自動終止，而本公司
亦不會再作出任何賠償。

benefit or any part thereof due to or in any event related to any illness/ sickness/ injury/ disability/ medical treatment and/ or any
complications or diseases related thereto in respect of the life insured, all these illness/ sickness/ injury/ disability/ medical treatment and/
or any complications or diseases related thereto shall in respect of the life insured remain excluded or restricted from any coverage/ benefit
under the New Coverage.
倘若保單持有人或受保人因任何病患／疾病／傷病／傷殘／治療及／或因此而導致的任何併發症或疾病而遭拒絕或限制接受原
有保障的任何保障或賠償，新保障將仍然拒絕或限制為此等所有與受保人有關之病患／疾病／傷病／傷殘／治療及／或因此而
導致的任何併發症或疾病提供保障／賠償。

DATE OF BENEFITS) as follows:-
“(1) Death Benefit
Eligibility for and coverage under the Death Benefit will commence at the later of
(a) the policy year date of this Policy, if this Provision was included when the Policy was issued; or
(b) the effective date of reinstatement of this Policy; or
(c) the date of endorsement or the effective date of change of this Provision, whichever is later, if this Provision was added after the
Policy had been issued.
(2) Hospital Benefits
For Accidental Injury, eligibility for and coverage under the Hospital Benefits will commence at the later of
(a) the policy year date of this Policy, if this Provision was included when the Policy was issued; or
(b) the effective date of reinstatement of this Policy; or
(c) the date of endorsement or the effective date of change of this Provision, whichever is later, if this Provision was added after the
Policy had been issued.

Manulife (International) Limited is requested to make the following additions, corrections and amendments in the application in
relation to the above policy number signed by me.
宏利人壽保險( 國際 )有限公司將按指示對本人就有關上述保單編號已簽署之申請書作出下列資料增補，更正及修改事宜。
It is agreed that they are to be of the same effect as it contained in the application.
所有資料均如申請書內之資料同樣有效。
(a) COLLECTION OF LEVY ON INSURANCE PREMIUM(S) BY THE INSURANCE AUTHORITY (“IA”) 保險業監管局(「保監局
」)所收取的保費徵費
I/We, the policyowner, hereby acknowledge, agree and confirm the following in relation to my obligations to pay a prescribed
levy on each premium payment made under the policy (“Levy”) pursuant to section 134 of the Insurance Ordinance (Cap. 41),
the Insurance (Levy) Regulation and the Insurance (Levy) Order:
本人/吾等(作為保單持有人)知悉、同意及確認，根據《保險業條例》(第 41 章)第 134條、《保險業(徵費) 規例》及《保險業(徵
費)令》，有關本人/吾等有責任於每次根據保單繳付保費時需同時繳付訂明徵費 (「徵費」) 的以下各項：
1. The policyowner shall, each time a premium is paid, pay Levy to the IA, via the Company, the amount of which is subject to
the rate and cap as prescribed by the Insurance (Levy) Order.
保單持有人需要於每次繳付保費時，透過本公司繳付徵費予保監局，其金額乃根據《保險業(徵費)令》所訂明的徵費率及徵費
上限而計算。
2. A failure to pay Levy by the policyowner when a premium is paid is a contravention of the Insurance (Levy) Regulation. The
IA may recover the outstanding Levy as a civil debt due to the IA and impose a pecuniary penalty at a rate as from time to
time prescribed under the Insurance (Levy) Regulation against the policyowner.
如保單持有人沒有於繳交保費時繳付徵費，保單持有人將會被視作違反《保險業(徵費)規例》。保監局有權以民事債項為基礎
追收未繳付的徵費，以及根據由《保險業(徵費) 規例》不時訂明的費率，對保單持有人施加罰款。
3. In the event of default for payment of Levy, the Company may, at its discretion and/or as reasonably required by the IA,
provide the particulars of the policyowner to the IA.
對於拖欠繳付徵費的情況，本公司可酌情決定及/或根據保監局合理的要求，提供保單持有人的詳情予保監局。
4. The Company shall collect Levy from the policyowner along with the payment of the corresponding premium. Unless
specified otherwise, where the premium is settled according to the terms of the policy and/or the instruction of the
policyowner through, including without limitation, direct debit from an account specified by the policyowner, deduction from
premium dump-in facility, accumulated dividends and/or other entitlements available to the policyowner, automatic premium
loan and/or other automatic premium payment options, the Levy corresponding to the premium so collected shall be
collected at the same time and in the same manner.
本公司將於保單持有人繳付保費時一併收取相應徵費。除非另有註明，否則，當保費以根據保單條款及/或保單持有人所指示
的方式繳付時，包括但不限於從保單持有人指定的直接付款帳戶扣繳、從保單注入款項、累計紅利及/或保單持有人的其他適
用權益扣除、以自動貸款代繳保費及/或其他自動繳交保費方式，則本公司將於同一時間及以相同方式收取該筆保費的相應徵
費。
5. Any outstanding of Levy shall be treated as an indebtedness to the Company and the Company may first deduct the amount
of outstanding Levy as indebtedness from the benefits and/or entitlements (including without limitation the cash value,
dividend and/or death proceeds of the policy) otherwise available to the policyowner, assignee or beneficiary, if any,
pursuant to the policy, as the case may be.
任何欠繳的徵費會被本公司視為負債。當本公司提供保障及/或權益予保單持有人、受讓人或受益人時，包括但不限於保單的
現金價值、紅利及/或死亡賠償(如適用及根據保單及情況而定)，可先從金額中扣除被視為負債的欠繳徵費。
6. The premium and levy can be paid in other currency as acceptable by the Company, by using the prevailing exchange rate
as determined by the Company which may change from time to time. Under such circumstances, the policyowner may be
subject to exchange rate fluctuation risk.
保費及徵費可以本公司所容許的其他貨幣支付，惟需根據當時適用的兌換率計算，而兌換率是由本公司釐定並可不時作出修訂。
在這情況下，保單持有人可能需承受匯率風險。
7. The above confirmation shall bind my/our successors, assignees and/or beneficiaries. This confirmation shall remain valid
notwithstanding my/our death or incapacity.
本人/吾等之繼承人、受讓人及/或受益人亦受此確認書約束。即使本人/吾等死亡或失行為能力，此確認書仍然存有法律效力。

客戶聲明
I, the Policyowner of the policy, hereby declare that I understand and agree to the following changes to the Policy:
本人 [ 此保單之保單持有人] 謹此聲明本人明白及同意下列對此保單之改動：
PARTICULARS
詳情
Notwithstanding any provisions to the contrary in this Policy or the Basic Plan, with effect from the Change Effective Date, this Policy shall be
amended as follows:-
不論本保單或基本計劃內有任何相反條款，本保單將由更改生效日期起作出以下修訂：
(1) The Basic Plan shall be terminated with no further liability on the part of the Company and no further benefits shall be payable under the Basic Plan.
基本計劃終止，而本公司於基本計劃下再無任何責任，亦毋須再支付任何賠償。
(2) The Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) shall remain in force, but no reinstatement thereof shall be allowed.
延續之附加保障維持生效，但不可就其申請復效。
(3) All Supplementary Benefits other than the Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) attached to this Policy shall be terminated.
除延續之附加保障以外，本保單所有附加保障全部終止。
(4) Where any of the Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) is expressed by its provision to be terminated when the Basic Plan is terminated, such
Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) shall remain in force notwithstanding such contrary provision. However, the Continued Supplementary
Benefit(s) shall in no circumstances remain in force beyond the date which otherwise would have been the maturity of the Basic Plan.
即使任何此等延續之附加保障於其條款中訂明會在基本計劃終止時同時終止，該延續之附加保障仍會維持生效，不論有任何具相反意
義之條款 。然而，不論任何情況下，延續之附加保障於基本計劃的原訂到期日以後不再生效。
(5) Where any of the Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) is expressed by its provision to be terminated when the Basic Plan is fully paid up, such
Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) shall remain in force notwithstanding such contrary provision.
即使任何此等延續之附加保障於其條款中訂明會在基本計劃繳清時終止，該延續之附加保障仍會維持生效，不論有任何具相反意義之
條款 。
(6) No further supplementary benefits shall be allowed.
不可再附加其他附加保障。
(7) All Inflation Protector Option (attached to the Basic Plan and/or the Continued Supplementary Benefit(s), if any) shall be terminated.
所有通脹加保權益（附帶於基本計劃及／或延續之附加保障，如有）全部終止 。

本保單之一般條款將會全部被删除，並由本公司之標準條款（包括以下條款）所取代：
PAYMENT OF PREMIUMS
繳付保費
Premiums are payable during the life insured’s lifetime in accordance with the premium schedule on the latest policy change endorsement. Any
date in the premium schedule which was based on the assumption that the life insured would be a specified age on such date will be corrected,
if necessary, to agree with the life insured’s true age.
保費支付人須於受保人在世期間，按照最新更改保單資料批註上的保費表繳付保費。如有需要，任何列於「保費表」上，假定受保人
將達某特定年齡之日期，將被修訂至與受保人之真實年齡相符。
Premium due date will be the first date of the payment cycle corresponding to the payment mode selected by the Policyowner. Failure to pay a
premium on or before its due date to the Company in accordance with the Company’s then payment handling procedures will constitute default
in payment of that premium.
保費到期日爲按投保人選擇之繳款方式所訂繳款週期的首日。若未能於每個到期日或之前，按本公司之繳款處理手續繳交保費予本公
司，便作不清償保費論。
A grace period of 31 days from its due date will be allowed for payment of a premium in default, during which time this policy will continue to
be in force. If a premium remains unpaid after expiration of the grace period, then, without the necessity of sending or giving to the Owner any
notarial or other notice, insurance under the policy will cease to be in force.
保費若於到期日仍未繳清，將有三十一天寬限期，期間保單仍然有效。若保費在寛限期後仍未繳交，則此保單將告失效，而本公司毋
須向保單持有人發出通知書。
Notwithstanding any other provision, premium in default will be deducted from any benefit payable under this policy.
不論有否其他條款，拖欠的保費將從應支付利益中扣除。
SUICIDE
自殺
If the life insured commits suicide, whether sane or insane, before the date 1 year after this policy’s date of issue, the Company’s liability under the
policy will be limited to the amount paid to the Company less any amount paid by the Company, the amounts being those paid under this policy.
於本保單簽發日起計一年內，若受保人自殺身亡，不論事發時精神是否健全，本公司之責任只限於將已繳交之保費，在扣除本公司對
本保單之支出後退還。
If the life insured commits suicide, whether sane or insane, before the date 1 year after the date of any reinstatement, the Company’s liability
under the policy will be limited to the liability had there been no reinstatement, increased by the amount paid to the Company after
reinstatement, excluding the repayment of default premium to the Company, and decreased by any amount paid by the Company, the amounts
being those paid under this policy.
以本保單復效日起計一年內，若受保人自殺身亡，不論事發時精神是否健全，本公司之責任只限於保單復效前之責任，如同保單從未
復效，以及退還在保單復效後繳交之保費 ( 不包括不清償保費 ) 扣除本公司對本保單之支出後之餘額。

Important Notes 重要事項:
1. eMPF Platform Company Limited ( "eMPF Company" ), a wholly owned subsidiary of the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Authority General Terms
( "MPFA" ), will provide the scheme administration services to you through the eMPF Platform, subject to the "General Terms and and Conditions of
Conditions of the eMPF Platform" which can be accessed from https://empf.org.hk/tnc/en. This form is applicable only if you have the eMPF Platform
積金易平台
previously given your signature specimen to the eMPF Platform / the Trustee. If not, please submit your request via eMPF Member
一般條款及細則
Portal or visit eMPF Service Centre to provide your signature specimen for verification. 積金易平台有限公司 (「積金易公司」) 是強制性
公積金計劃管理局 (「積金局」) 的全資附屬公司。積金易公司將根據「積金易平台一般條款及細則」( 可於 https://empf.org.hk/tnc 瀏覽 )，
透過積金易平台為你提供計劃行政服務。本表格只適用於如你已經提供簽署樣式予積金易平台╱受託人。如你尚未提供有關紀錄，請透過
積金易成員平台遞交指示或前往積金易服務中心以提供你的簽署樣式以作核對用途。
2. Please read the MPF Scheme Brochure and the Key Scheme Information Document ( "KSID" ) of the Scheme and the Important Notes
carefully before completing this form. 填寫本表格前，請先參閱本計劃之強積金計劃說明書、主要計劃資料文件及重要事項。
3. The information provided in this form will supersede any previous information which has been submitted to the eMPF Platform / the Trustee ( if applicable ).
The existing information will remain unchanged if no update for relevant part(s) in this form. 本表格所列之資料將取代所有之前已遞交予積金易平台╱受託人的
資料( 如適用 )。如本表格相關部份沒有更新，現有資料將維持不變。
4. Please complete this form in BLOCK LETTERS with black or blue pen and tick the appropriate box(es). Please countersign beside any amendment.請用黑色
或藍色筆以正楷填寫本表格，並在適當空格內填上剔號。如有刪改，請於更改位置旁加簽。
5. The signature ( including countersign ) in this form should match with the signature specimen of the eMPF Platform / the Trustee ( please refer to point 1 of
the Important Notes ). 本表格的簽署( 包括加簽 )必須與積金易平台╱受託人的簽署樣式相符(請參閱重要事項第一點)。
6. The eMPF Platform will process this request upon receipt of this completed form and all relevant supporting document(s) ( if any ). If there are any omissions
( including but not limited to missing page(s) / supporting document(s) ), the eMPF Platform may not be able to process this request. 積金易平台收到完整表格
及相關證明文件 ( 如有 )後，才會處理有關指示。如有遺漏 ( 包括但不限於頁數╱證明文件不齊全 )，積金易平台可能未能執行此指示。
7. Please submit a separate form for each of the accounts ( if applicable ). 請就每個帳戶分別填寫一份表格 ( 如適用 )。
8. The information provided in this form will be used in accordance with the relevant MPF legislation and for the purposes mentioned in the "Personal Information
Collection Statement" ( "PICS" ) of the eMPF Platform and the Scheme. For details, please refer to the PICS provided overleaf. 本表格所有已提供的資料將按
照有關強積金法例、積金易平台及本計劃《收集個人資料聲明》(「聲明」)處理。詳情請參閱後頁所提供的「聲明」。

is HKD60,000 and it is an aggregate limit for both TVC and qualifying deferred annuity policy premiums. 就可扣稅自願性供款帳戶持有人，根據《稅務條例》，薪俸稅及個人入息課稅的最
高可扣稅金額為港幣60,000元。該筆金額為可扣稅自願性供款及其他合資格延期年金保費的總限額。
2 There are two options for making contributions. You can make regular contribution and / or lump sum contribution. Please note that if you choose to make lump sum contribution in
addition to regular contribution, or vice versa, the two instructions will not override each other. If you wish to stop making regular contribution, please complete Part E of this form. 供款有
兩種付款模式。你可揀選定期供款及╱或整筆供款。請注意，如你選擇定期供款後再作出整筆供款，或選擇整筆供款後，再作出定期供款，兩項指示將不會互相取代。如你擬停止作出定
期供款，請填寫本表格E部分。
3 If no effective date is indicated or the indicated effective date is earlier than the processing date of the eMPF Platform, the eMPF Platform will follow up your request. 如沒有填寫生效日期
或填寫的生效日期早於積金易平台的執行日，積金易平台將會跟進你的指示。

法作出選擇，而你已設立直接扣帳，付款方法將預設為「直接扣帳」。否則，將預設為「支票」及不作另行通知。

(i) Set Up / Change Direct Debit 設立╱更改直接扣帳
• Please download "Direct Debit Authorization" ( "DDA Form" ) via visiting the website of the eMPF Platform ( https://empf.org.hk/forms/en ) or Form Centre
scanning the QR code and complete "DDA Form" if you wish to set up / change direct debit. It takes approximately 3 to 6 weeks from the receipt 表格中心
date of your completed "DDA Form". The eMPF Platform will send you a confirmation notifying you the success of direct debit setup / change.
Please settle contribution by other payment means before direct debit setup / change is completed. 如你擬設立╱更改直接扣帳，請透過瀏覽積金易
平台的網頁 ( https://empf.org.hk/forms ) 或掃描二維碼下載及填寫「直接付款授權」(「直接付款授權表格」)。設立╱更改直接扣帳由收到完整「直
接付款授權表格」起計，約需時三至六個星期。積金易平台將會發出確認書，通知你有關直接扣帳申請成功設立╱更改。於直接扣帳辦妥前，請透過
其他付款途徑付款。
• Please fill in monthly direct debit day in Part D(1)(ii) below for direct debit setup. 就設立直接扣帳，請於下列D(1)(ii) 部分填寫每月直接扣帳日。
• As the setup / change of direct debit takes time, you may make the contribution by other payment method until the direct debit has been set up and
provide payment information below ( if applicable ). 由於設立╱更改直接扣帳需時，你可以其他付款方法繳付供款直至直接扣帳成功設立及提供下列付款

• The eMPF Platform will arrange direct debit on the monthly direct debit day indicated above. If no monthly direct debit day is indicated for regular contribution, it will
be defaulted to 10th of the month. If the selected direct debit day falls on a Saturday, a public holiday, a gale warning day or black rainstorm warning day, it will be the
following working day. 積金易平台將會在上述每月直接扣帳日安排直接扣帳。如沒有就定期供款填寫每月直接扣帳日，此將預設為每月的10日。如揀選的直接扣帳日為星
期六、公眾假日、烈風或黑色暴雨警告日，則順延至隨後的工作天。
• Please note that the monthly direct debit date may vary due to the transactional arrangement of the relevant bank. 請注意每月直接扣帳日期或會因有關銀行的交易安排而
有所不同。

• If you have set up direct debit, please maintain sufficient funds in the bank account for the lump sum payment before returning this form to the eMPF Platform. The eMPF
Platform will debit the lump sum contribution from your existing bank account after processing this form. 如你已設立直接扣帳，遞交本表格予積金易平台前，請確保銀行戶
口內備有足夠款項作整筆供款。積金易平台將在處理此表格後，從你現有的銀行戶口中扣除整筆供款。

祈付「宏利公積金信託有限公司」。

submission to the eMPF Platform directly. 請注意強積金中介人並非收取強積金供款支票的正式途徑，你應直接遞交供款及有關文件予積金易平台。
• Payment can be made via HSBC cheque deposit machines ( "CQM" ). Please select "03" for the CQM bill type and input your 16-digit "MPF Contribution Bill
No." or 16-digit eMPF "Submission Reference No.". ( Not applicable to SVC ) 供款支票可透過滙豐銀行存支票機存入。請在存支票機上選擇帳單類別「03」，並
輸入你的16位數字「強積金供款帳單號碼」或16位數字積金易「提交參考編號」。( 不適用於特別自願性供款 )

✦Warning 警告:
Pursuant to section 43E of the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Ordinance ( Cap. 485 ), a person who, in any document given to (i) the MPFA, (ii) a system operator of
the eMPF Platform, or (iii) an approved trustee, knowingly or recklessly makes a statement which is false or misleading in a material respect commits an offence and is liable
to a maximum penalty of a HKD100,000 fine and 12 months' imprisonment on the first conviction and a HKD200,000 fine and two years' imprisonment on each subsequent
conviction. A person who knowingly and wilfully makes ( otherwise than on oath ) a statement false in a material particular also commits an offence under section 36 of the
Crimes Ordinance ( Cap. 200 ) and is liable on conviction to imprisonment for two years and to a fine. 根據《強制性公積金計劃條例》( 第485 章 )第43E條，任何人在給予 (i) 積
金局，(ii) 積金易平台的系統營運者，或 (iii) 核准受託人的任何文件中，明知或罔顧後果地作出在要項上屬虛假或具誤導性的陳述，即屬犯罪。首次定罪者，最高可處罰款港幣
100,000元及監禁十二個月；其後每次定罪，最高可處罰款港幣200,000元及監禁兩年。根據《刑事罪行條例》( 第200章 )第36條，任何人明知而故意在非經宣誓的情況下在要
項上作出屬虛假的陳述，亦屬犯罪。一經定罪，可處監禁兩年及罰款。

complete. 本人╱我們聲明，就本人╱我們所知所信，本授權內所填報的所有資料及聲明均屬真實、正確及完整。
3. In the absence of wilful default, gross negligence or fraud, I / we agree to indemnify and keep the eMPF Platform / the trustee indemnified against any and all

Important Notes 重要事項 :
1. eMPF Platform Company Limited ( "eMPF Company" ), a wholly owned subsidiary of the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Authority General Terms
( "MPFA" ), will provide the scheme administration services to you through the eMPF Platform, subject to the "General Terms and and Conditions of
Conditions of the eMPF Platform" which can be accessed from https://empf.org.hk/tnc/en. This form is applicable only if your company the eMPF Platform
積金易平台
/ you has / have previously given the signature specimen of the authorized person(s) / your signature specimen to the eMPF Platform /
一般條款及細則
the trustee. If not, please submit your request via eMPF Web Portal or visit eMPF Service Centre to provide your signature specimen for
verification. 積金易平台有限公司 (「積金易公司」) 是強制性公積金計劃管理局 (「積金局」) 的全資附屬公司。積金易公司將根據「積
金易平台一般條款及細則」( 可於 https://empf.org.hk/tnc 瀏覽 )，透過積金易平台為你提供計劃行政服務。本表格只適用於如你公司╱你
已經提供獲授權人的簽署樣式╱你的簽署樣式予積金易平台╱受託人。如你公司╱你尚未提供有關紀錄，請透過積金易網上平台遞交指
示或前往積金易服務中心以提供簽署樣式以作核對用途。( Applicable if your company / you has / have enrolled MPF Account under the
eMPF Platform. 只適用於如你公司╱你已於積金易平台登記強積金帳戶。)
2. This form is applicable to employer, self-employed person, special voluntary contributions account member and tax deductible voluntary contributions account
member. 本表格適用於僱主、自僱人士、特別自願性供款帳戶成員及可扣稅自願性供款帳戶成員。
3. For employer, each payroll group is required to complete a separate Direct Debit Authorization ( "DDA" ). 就僱主而言，須分別就每一工資組別填寫一份直接付
款授權。
4. Please complete this form in BLOCK LETTERS with black or blue pen and tick the appropriate boxes. Please countersign beside any amendment. 請用黑色
或藍色筆以正楷填寫本表格，並在適當空格內填上剔號。如有刪改，請於更改位置旁加簽。
5. The signature ( including countersign ) in this form should match with the signature specimen of your bank account, the eMPF Platform and / or the trustee as
applicable. 本表格的簽署(包括加簽)必須與你銀行戶口、積金易平台及╱或受託人的簽署樣式相符。
6. The eMPF Platform will process this request upon receipt of this completed form and all relevant supporting document(s) ( if any ). If there are any omissions
( including but not limited to missing page(s) / supporting document(s) ), the eMPF Platform may not be able to process this request. 積金易平台收到完整表格
及相關證明文件(如有)後，才會處理有關指示。如有遺漏 ( 包括但不限於頁數╱證明文件不齊全 )，積金易平台可能未能執行此指示。
7. The application / change of Direct Debit Authorization ( "DDA" ) takes approximately 3 to 6 weeks from receipt of your completed form. A confirmation notice
will be sent to you / your company after the success of DDA setup / change. Please submit contribution payment by other means before DDA setup / change
is completed. 申請╱更改直接付款授權由收到完整表格起計，約需時三至六個星期。直接付款授權成功設立╱更改後，積金易平台將會發出確認通知書予你╱
你公司。直接付款授權未辦妥前，請透過其他途徑支付供款。
8. New direct debit authorization will supersede the existing direct debit authorization ( if any ), the eMPF Platform will continue to debit your existing direct debit
account for contributions until the new direct debit authorization becomes effective. 新的直接付款授權將會取代現有的直接付款授權 ( 如有 )，積金易平台將繼
續從你現有的直接付款戶口中扣除供款，直至新的直接付款授權生效。
9. Since the contribution frequency / the number of debit attempts for each contribution may vary, you are recommended not to specify a limit on the number of
debits with your bank when setting up DDA. Setting a limit may lead to autopay rejections and delays in processing contributions. 由於供款週期╱每期供款扣
帳的次數可能不同，建議你於設定直接付款授權時毋須向銀行設定次數限制。設定限額可能會導致自動轉帳被拒，並延誤供款。
10. The information provided in this form will be used in accordance with the relevant MPF legislation and for the purposes mentioned in the "Personal Information
Collection Statement" ( "PICS" ) of the eMPF Platform and the Scheme. For details, please refer to the PICS provided overleaf. 本表格所有已提供的資料將按
照有關強積金法例、積金易平台及本計劃《收集個人資料聲明》(「聲明」) 處理。詳情請參閱後頁所提供的「聲明」。
Bank Account Holder(s) Authorization and Declaration 銀行戶口持有人授權及聲明
1. I / We hereby authorize my / our below named Bank to effect transfers from my / our account to the Beneficiary in accordance with such instructions as my /
our Bank may receive from the Beneficiary and / or its banker's correspondent from time to time. 本人╱我們現授權本人╱我們之下述銀行，根據受益人及╱
或代理行不時給予本人╱我們銀行之指示，自本人╱我們之戶口內轉帳至受益人。
2. I / We agree that my / our Bank shall not be obliged to ascertain whether or not notice of any such transfer has been given to me / us. 本人╱我們同意本人╱
我們之銀行無須證實該等轉帳通知是否已交予本人╱我們。
3. I / We jointly and severally accept full responsibility for any overdraft ( or increase in existing overdraft ) on my / our account which may arise as a result of
any such transfer(s). 如因該等轉帳而令本人╱我們之戶口出現透支 ( 或令現時之透支增加 )，本人╱我們願共同及個別承擔全部責任。
4. I / We confirm that my / our signature(s) on this authorization is / are the same as that / those for the operation of my / our bank account to be debited for the
transfer. 本人╱我們確認，本人╱我們於本授權上之簽名，與本人╱我們之銀行戶口所簽的完全相同。
5. I / We agree to notify the Beneficiary of any change of bank account and further agree that should there be insufficient funds in my / our bank account to meet
any transfer hereby authorized, the Bank shall be entitled, at its discretion, not to effect such transfer in which event the Bank may make the usual service
charge to be paid by me / us and that it may cancel this authorization at its sole discretion at any time without prior notice. 本人╱我們同意給予受益人任何更
改銀行戶口之通知，並且同意如本人╱我們之戶口並無足夠款項支付本人╱我們授權轉帳，則本人╱我們之銀行有權不予轉帳，而且銀行可向本人╱我們收取
慣常之費用，並可隨時自行決定取消該授權轉帳且毋須通知本人╱我們。
6. This authorization shall have effect until further notice. 本授權將繼續生效直至另行通知為止。
7. I / We agree that any notice of cancellation / change of this authorization which I / we may give to my / our Bank shall be given at least 7 working days prior to
the date on which such cancellation / change is to take effect and at the same time such notice shall be given to the Beneficiary. 本人╱我們同意，本人╱我們
取消╱更改本授權之任何通知，須於取消╱更改生效日最少七個工作天之前交予本人╱我們之銀行，並同時應將該通知交予受益人。
8. I / We agree that the amount deducted from time to time will be used for the contribution payment for all my / our outstanding contribution payment and
contribution surcharge. 本人╱我們同意不時扣除之金額，將用作繳交本人╱我們所有未繳付之供款期的供款及供款附加費。
9. I / We have read and understood the General Terms and Conditions of the eMPF Platform, the Important Notes, the Bank Account Holder(s) Authorization
and Declaration and the PICS of the eMPF Platform and the Scheme and agree to abide by the rules stated therein. 本人╱我們已閱讀及明白積金易平台一般
條款及細則、重要事項、銀行戶口持有人授權及聲明及積金易平台及本計劃「聲明」的內容，並同意遵守當中所述規則。

BETWEEN:
(1) Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited, whose registered office is at 22/F., Manulife Financial Centre, 223 - 231 Wai Yip Street, Kwun Tong,
Kowloon, Hong Kong (the "Trustee"); and
(2) the applicant, whose name and address are given in this Participation Agreement (the "Employer").
RECITALS:
(A) The Trustee is the Trustee of the MANULIFE GLOBAL SELECT (MPF) SCHEME (the "Master Trust Scheme"), which was established by a deed made by
the Trustee (as may be amended from time to time, the "Deed").
(B) The Employer wishes to join the Master Trust Scheme in order to establish a retirement benefits scheme (the "Sub-Scheme") for the benefit of its employees.
(C) The Sub-Scheme shall be governed by the Deed and the rules attached thereto (the "Rules") and this Participation Agreement.
(D) Unless otherwise stated words and expressions used in this Participation Agreement shall have the meanings given to them in the Deed.
PROVISIONS:
1. The Employer hereby establishes the Sub-Scheme with effect from the commencement date as specified in this Participation Agreement. The Sub-Scheme
shall be governed by the terms of the Deed, the Rules and this Participation Agreement.
2. The Employer hereby covenants with the Trustee to comply with and be bound by the provisions of the Deed, the Rules and this Participation Agreement and
all applicable law and regulations.
3. The Employer warrants that the information contained in this Participation Agreement and any other information from time to time to be provided by the
Employer in relation to contributions and as to the age, salary, length of service, benefits, Contribution Investment Instruction, Fund Switching Instruction and
otherwise in relation to each Employee Member will be correct in all respects.
4. Subject to the provisions of the Master Trust Deed, the Rules and this Participation Agreement, the Employer undertakes and agrees, to hold the Trustee (and
any Investment Manager who may be appointed under the Deed by the Trustee) indemnified against any and all proceedings, costs, charges, liabilities and
expenses occasioned by any and all actions, claims, demands or proceedings in connection with the Trust or the Sub-Scheme arising:
(i) out of the breach by the Employer of the warranty referred to in paragraph 3; or
(ii) as a result of any failure or omission on the part of the Employer to duly and punctually perform or observe any obligations pursuant to the Master Trust
Deed, the Rules and this Participation Agreement or otherwise so far as they relate to the Employer and Employee Members of the Sub-Scheme (whether
they relate to the Employer and such Employee Members alone or together with another Employer and Employee Members of other Sub-Schemes).
5. The Employer undertakes and agrees to pay all fees and expenses which are payable by it under the terms of the Master Trust Deed, the Rules and this
Participation Agreement.
6. The Trustee and the Employer hereby confirm and acknowledge that the details specified in this Participation Agreement shall apply for the purposes of the
Sub-Scheme.
7. The Employer hereby agrees that the Trustee may, in its sole discretion, deduct the fees and expenses as specified in Clause 19.5.1 of the Deed from the
Reserve Account of the Employer under the Sub-Scheme.
8. The amount of Employer's Regular Voluntary Contribution and Employee's Regular Voluntary Contribution are to be specified by the Employer to the Trustee
in such form / manner as prescribed by the Trustee from time to time.
9. The vesting scale(s) referred to in Rule 7.3 of the Deed are specified in such form / manner as prescribed by the Trustee from time to time.
10. This Participation Agreement shall be terminated in accordance with Rule 19.5 of the Deed.
11. This Participation Agreement shall be governed by the laws of Hong Kong.
由下列雙方訂立：
(1) 宏利公積金信託有限公司登記地址為香港九龍觀塘偉業街223 - 231號宏利金融中心22樓（下稱「受託人」）；及
(2) 申請人，其名稱及地址列於本參與協議上（下稱「僱主」）。
敘文：
(甲) 受託人指宏利環球精選（強積金）計劃（下稱「集成信託計劃」）之受託人，該計劃由受託人契據（下稱「契據」）形式成立（「契據」可不時被修正）。
(乙) 僱主欲藉加入集成信託計劃設立退休福利計劃（下稱「附屬計劃」）造福僱員。
(丙) 附屬計劃受契據及隨附之規則（下稱「規則」）與本參與協議管限。
(丁) 除非另有所指，否則本參與協議採用之字眼及詞彙應具有契約所賦予的含義。
條款：
1. 僱主謹從本參與協議上所示之生效日期起設立附屬計劃。附屬計劃受契據、規則及本參與協議管限。
2. 僱主謹與受託人契諾遵守契據、規則、本參與協議及所有適用法例與法規內之條款並受其約束。
3. 僱主保證本參與協議所載資料及僱主就涉及供款與僱員年齡、薪酬、年資、福利、供款投資指示及基金調配指示等事項不時提供之資料正確無誤。
4. 僱主根據集成信託契據、規則及本參與協議，承諾並同意就因下列情況引起且涉及信託及附屬計劃的任何行動、索償、要求或訴訟所招致的一切程序、費用、
責任及開支，向受託人（及受託人根據契據委任的任何投資經理）作出彌償：
(i) 因僱主違反上文第三段所述的保證；或
(ii) 由於僱主因疏忽或遺漏而未能適當與及時履行或遵守集成信託契據、規則及本參與協議內所列有關附屬計劃僱主及僱員的責任（不論僅涉及個別僱主及
僱員或有關其他附屬計劃的僱主及僱員）。
1 of 26 GS-ERA-26V1
1
5. 僱主承諾並同意支付按集成信託契據、規則及本參與協議須要支付之一切費用及開支。
6. 受託人及僱主謹確認及聲明本參與協議內之資料同樣適用於附屬計劃。
7. 僱主同意受託人可全權酌情決定是否從僱主於附屬計劃中的儲備帳戶內扣除列於契據第19.5.1條的費用及開支。
8. 僱主定期自願性供款及僱員定期自願性供款的款額，由僱主以受託人不時指定的形式/方式向受託人註明。
9. 契據條款第7.3條論及之歸屬比例，已經以受託人不時指定的形式∕方式向受託人註明。
10. 本參與協議可按契據規則第19.5條終止。
11. 本參與協議受香港法例管限。
Important Notes 重要事項 :

Conditions of the eMPF Platform" which can be accessed from https://empf.org.hk/tnc/en. 積金易平台有限公司 (「積金易公司」) 是強制 the eMPF Platform

覽 )，透過積金易平台為你提供計劃行政服務。

說明書及主要計劃資料文件；及

(iii) the following Important Notes. 以下重要事項。
3. If the employer is in doubt about the contents of this agreement, the MPF Scheme Brochure, the KSID or the trust deed ( "Trust Deed" ) of the Scheme, the
employer should consult his / her solicitor, accountant or financial advisor. 如僱主對本協議、本計劃之強積金計劃說明書、主要計劃資料文件或信託契約 ( 或稱
信託契據 ) 的內容有疑問，應該諮詢其律師、會計師或財務顧問。
4. Please complete this agreement in BLOCK LETTERS with black or blue pen and tick the appropriate box(es). 請用黑色或藍色筆以正楷填寫本協議，並在適當
空格內填上剔號。
5. Please countersign beside any amendment with the same signature as shown in Part G Authorization and Declaration. 如有刪改，請於更改位置旁加簽而該簽
署必須與G 部分授權及聲明的簽署相符。
6. The eMPF Platform will process this application upon receipt of this completed agreement and all relevant supporting document(s) ( if any ). If there are any
omissions ( including but not limited to missing page(s) / supporting document(s) ), the eMPF Platform may not be able to process this application. 積金易平
台收到完整協議及相關證明文件(如有)後，才會處理有關申請。如有遺漏 ( 包括但不限於頁數╱證明文件不齊全 )，積金易平台可能未能執行此申請。
7. "Participating Employer" means the company or individual whose details are set out in Part A of this agreement. 「參與僱主」指其資料列載於本協議A部分的
公司或個人。
8. The information of the connected person(s) ( including but not limited to contact person(s) / scheme authorized person(s) ) is collected in their official
capacities. 關連人士的資料 ( 包括但不限於聯絡人╱計劃獲授權人士 )乃因應其職務身分而收集。
9. The employer particulars, including but not limited to company name, business registration no., jurisdiction of incorporation or organisation, registered
address, principal business address and correspondence address, etc., provided in this agreement and other related documents will form part of tax residency
self-certification for the entity / sole proprietor specified in Part A below. 於本協議提供的僱主資料，包括但不限於公司名稱、商業登記證號碼、公司或機構註冊
所在的司法管轄區、註冊地址、主要業務地址及通訊地址等及其他相關文件，將會成為下列A 部分中指定的實體╱獨資經營者的稅務居民身分自我證明的一部
分。
10. Information provided in this agreement will be updated by the eMPF Platform for the entity / sole proprietor for the purpose of Automatic Exchange of Financial
Account Information ( "AEOI" ) and Common Reporting Standard ( "CRS" ). The eMPF Platform will update the jurisdiction of tax residency to all your MPF
account(s) maintained in the eMPF Platform. 積金易平台會將本協議所提供的資料用作更新實體╱獨資經營者自動交換財務帳戶資料及「共同匯報標準」的用
途。積金易平台將會更新你於積金易平台保存的所有強積金帳戶的稅務居民所在司法管轄區。

Important Notes 重要事項 :
1. eMPF Platform Company Limited ( "eMPF Company" ), a wholly owned subsidiary of the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Authority General Terms
( "MPFA" ), will provide the scheme administration services to you through the eMPF Platform, subject to the "General Terms and and Conditions of
Conditions of the eMPF Platform" which can be accessed from https://empf.org.hk/tnc/en. 積金易平台有限公司 (「積金易公司」) 是強制 the eMPF Platform
積金易平台
性公積金計劃管理局 (「積金局」) 的全資附屬公司。積金易公司將根據「積金易平台一般條款及細則」( 可於 https://empf.org.hk/tnc 瀏覽 )， 一般條款及細則
透過積金易平台為你提供計劃行政服務。
2. Please read the following before completing this form: 填寫本表格前，請細閱以下部分：
(i) the MPF Scheme Brochure and the Key Scheme Information Document ( "KSID" ) of the Scheme. You can download the MPF Scheme Brochure
and the KSID by visiting the website of MPFA ( https://www.mpfa.org.hk/assets/OD/MT00482_Manulife_Global_Select_(MPF)_Scheme_EN.pdf )
or scanning the QR code as shown in Part A below; and 本計劃之強積金計劃說明書及主要計劃資料文件。你可透過瀏覽積金局的網頁
( https://www.mpfa.org.hk/assets/OD/MT00482_Manulife_Global_Select_(MPF)_Scheme_CH.pdf ) 或掃描於下列 A 部分所顯示的二維碼下載強積金計劃
說明書及主要計劃資料文件；及
(ii) Part D "Personal Information Collection Statement" ( "PICS" ) of the eMPF Platform and the Scheme; and D 部分積金易平台及本計劃《收集個人資料聲明》
(「聲明」)；及
(iii) the following Important Notes. 以下重要事項。
3. If the Member is in doubt about the contents of this form, the MPF Scheme Brochure, the KSID or the trust deed ( "Trust Deed" ) of the Scheme, the Member
should consult his / her solicitor, accountant or financial advisor. 如成員對本表格、本計劃之強積金計劃說明書、主要計劃資料文件或信託契約 ( 或稱信託契據 )
的內容有疑問，應該諮詢其律師、會計師或財務顧問。
4. Please complete this form in BLOCK LETTERS with black or blue pen and tick the appropriate box(es). 請用黑色或藍色筆以正楷填寫本表格，並在適當空格
內填上剔號。
5. Please countersign beside any amendment with the same signature as shown in Part E Authorization and Declaration. 如有刪改，請於更改位置旁加簽而該簽
署必須與E部分授權及聲明的簽署相符。
6. The eMPF Platform will process this application upon receipt of this completed form and all relevant supporting document(s) ( if any ). If there are any
omissions ( including but not limited to missing page(s) / supporting document(s) ), the eMPF Platform may not be able to process this application. 積金易平
台收到完整表格及相關證明文件( 如有 )後，才會處理有關申請。如有遺漏 ( 包括但不限於頁數╱證明文件不齊全 )，積金易平台可能未能執行此申請。
7. The member particulars, including but not limited to member name, identification document no., date of birth, residential address and correspondence
address, provided in Part A forms part of tax residency self-certification for an individual account holder specified in Part A below. 於本表格A部分提供的成員
資料，包括但不限於成員姓名、身分證明文件號碼、出生日期、居住地址及通訊地址，會成為下列A部分指明的個別人士帳戶持有人稅務居民身分自我證明的
一部分。
8. Information provided in this form will be updated by the eMPF Platform for the individual account holder specified in Part A for the purpose of Automatic
Exchange of Financial Account Information ( "AEOI" ) and Common Reporting Standard ( "CRS" ). The eMPF Platform will update the jurisdiction of tax
residency to all your MPF account(s) maintained in the eMPF Platform. 積金易平台會將本表格所提供的資料用作更新 A 部分指明的個別人士帳戶持有人自動
交換財務帳戶資料及「共同匯報標準」的用途。積金易平台將會更新你於積金易平台保存的所有強積金帳戶的稅務居民所在司法管轄區。

Platform shall adopt 31 December as the Member's birthday. Likewise, if the Member's HKID Card contains only year and month but not the day of birth, the eMPF Platform shall adopt
the last day of the month as the birthday. If the Member leaves the month and / or day blank, the eMPF Platform shall follow the above rules to adopt the date of birth as the last day of
that month or 31 December. 如成員的香港身份證上只有出生年份，而成員沒有其他證件證明實際出生日期 ( 例如出生證明書或護照 )，積金易平台將以該年之12 月31 日作為成員的出生

B. SELF-CERTIFICATION OF TAX RESIDENCY AND TAXPAYER IDENTIFICATION NUMBER OR ITS
FUNCTIONAL EQUIVALENT ( "TIN" ) 2
稅務居民身分自我證明及稅務編號或具有等同功能的識辨編號 (「稅務編號」) 2
• This is a self-certification provided by you to the Trustee for the purpose of Automatic Exchange of Financial Account Information ( "AEOI" ) in compliance
with tax law and regulations ( including but not limited to the Inland Revenue Ordinance ( Cap. 112 ) and regulations based on the Organisation for Economic
Cooperation and Development ( "OECD" ) Common Reporting Standard ( "CRS" ) for automatic exchange of information ). 這是你向受託人提供的自我證明，
以作自動交換財務帳戶資料用途以遵守稅務法律及規例 ( 包括但不限於《稅務條例》( 第112 章 ) 及根據自動交換資料有關的經濟合作與發展組織 (「OECD」)《共
同匯報標準》(「CRS」) 的規則 )。
• The information provided by you in this part will be updated by the eMPF Platform for all your MPF account(s) maintained in the eMPF Platform for the
purpose of AEOI and CRS. 你於本部分提供的資料將會更新你於積金易平台保存的所有強積金帳戶用作自動交換財務帳戶資料及「共同匯報標準」的用途。
• Each jurisdiction has its own rules for defining tax residence, and various jurisdictions provide information on how to determine if you are resident in that
particular jurisdiction for tax purposes. In general, you will find that your jurisdiction of tax residence is the jurisdiction / country in which you live. Special
circumstances may cause you to be resident elsewhere or resident in more than one jurisdiction / country at the same time ( dual residency ) for tax purposes.
For more information on jurisdiction of tax residence, please consult your tax adviser or the information at the OECD automatic exchange of information
portal ( http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/crs-implementation-and-assistance/tax-residency/ ). 每個稅務管轄區會按照其稅務法律訂定稅務居民的
定義，並提供相關資料讓你判定是否屬某一稅務管轄區的稅務居民。一般而言，你的稅務居留司法管轄區╱國家會根據你的居住地點而定，因此，如你有多於
一處居所 ( 雙重居住地 )，你可能會同時成為多個稅務管轄區╱國家的稅務居民。有關稅務居民身分的更多資訊，請諮詢你的稅務顧問或瀏覽OECD的自動交
換資料網頁 ( http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/crs-implementation-and-assistance/tax-residency/ )。
• If you are tax resident in a reportable jurisdiction 3 of Hong Kong, you will be classified as a reportable person for AEOI, the Trustee will be legally obliged to
pass on the information provided in this self-certification and other financial information with respect to your account(s) to the Hong Kong Inland Revenue
Department ( "IRD" ), and they will transmit this information to the tax authorities of which you are tax resident. 如你的稅務居民所在地屬香港申報稅務管轄區3，
你將會被界定為自動交換資料下的申報對象，受託人在法律上有義務將你於本自我證明申報的資料，你財務帳戶有關的某些財務資料轉交予香港稅務局，而相
關資料或會與你作為稅務居民所屬的稅務機關交換。
• The member particulars, including but not limited to member name, identification document no., date of birth, residential address and correspondence
address, provided in Part A forms part of this self-certification. 於A部分提供的成員資料，包括但不限於成員姓名、身分證明文件號碼、出生日期、居住地址及
通訊地址，會成為本自我證明的一部分。
• This self-certification will remain valid unless there is any change in circumstances relating to information that makes this self-certification incorrect, inaccurate
or incomplete. You must notify the eMPF Platform / the Trustee and provide an updated self-certification within 30 days of such change in circumstances. 除
非情況有所改變而引致已提交的自我證明上的資料不正確、不準確或不完整，否則該已提交的自我證明仍具十足效力。如情況有所改變，你務必通知積金易平
台╱受託人，並需要在發生改變後30 天內向積金易平台╱受託人提供一份已更新的自我證明。
• The eMPF Platform MUST obtain the complete and valid tax residency self-certification for the setting up of member account. To avoid any delay in the setting up
of member account and contribution settlement ( if any ), please read and complete all the appropriate parts below. 積金易平台在開立成員帳戶前，必須取得完整
及有效的稅務居民身分自我證明。為避免成員帳戶開立及供款處理( 如有 )有任何延誤，請細閱並完成以下所有適用部分。
• The eMPF Platform / The Trustee has right to require you to provide all relevant identification / verification documentation. Failure in providing the information
and other personal data as requested may result in your application / instruction not being able to be processed. 積金易平台╱受託人有權要求你提供所有相
關的身分證明╱驗證文件。如未能提供所需資料及其他個人資料，可能導致你的申請╱指示不獲處理。
• Kindly note that the eMPF Platform / the Trustee is not allowed to offer any tax or legal advice to you. For tax-related OECD-CRS IRD稅務局
questions, please consult your tax adviser or visit the OECD ( http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/crs-
implementation-and-assistance/ ) and IRD's AEOI website ( http://www.ird.gov.hk/eng/tax/dta_aeoi.htm ), or simply scan
the QR code, for more CRS and related information. 請注意積金易平台╱受託人不獲允許向你提供稅務或法律意見。任何
稅務相關的疑問，請詢問專業稅務顧問或瀏覽OECD ( http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/crs-implementation-
and-assistance/ ) 及稅務局 ( http://www.ird.gov.hk/chi/tax/dta_aeoi.htm ) 有關自動交換財務帳戶資料的網頁，或掃描此二
維碼，以獲取更多CRS 及相關資料。

C. INVESTMENT MANDATE 投資授權
Please read the following before completing Part C. 於填寫C部分前，請閱讀以下事項。
1. You can choose to invest your transfer-in monies in the Default Investment Strategy ( "DIS" ) and / or any constituent funds. However, if you do not wish to
make any investment choice, you do not have to do so. In the event of no investment choice or no valid investment mandate is provided, all transfer-in monies
will be invested in accordance with the DIS. 你可選擇將你轉入之款項投資於預設投資策略及╱或任何成分基金。但是，如你不想作出任何投資選擇，可無須這
樣做。如沒有作出投資選擇或沒有提交有效的投資授權，所有轉入之款項將按照預設投資策略進行投資。
2. DIS is a default investment arrangement as stipulated in accordance with the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Ordinance. The DIS is invested in the Core
Accumulation Fund ▲ and the Age 65 Plus Fund ▽ according to the pre-set allocation percentages at different ages and will adjust risk by way of reducing the
holding in the Core Accumulation Fund ▲ and increasing the holding in the Age 65 Plus Fund ▽ after the Member reaches 50 years of age. For more details on
de-risking of the DIS, please refer to the MPF Scheme Brochure and the KSID of the Scheme. 預設投資策略是一項根據《強制性公積金計劃條例》規定的預設
投資安排。預設投資策略透過於不同年齡按照預定配置百分比來投資於核心累積基金▲與65歲後基金▽及會隨著成員年滿50歲後以減持核心累積基金▲及增持
65歲後基金▽來調整風險。有關預設投資策略降低風險機制的詳情，可參閱本計劃之強積金計劃說明書及主要計劃資料文件。
▲ It refers to the Manulife MPF Core Accumulation Fund of the Scheme. 即本計劃的宏利 MPF 核心累積基金。
▽ It refers to the Manulife MPF Age 65 Plus Fund of the Scheme. 即本計劃的宏利 MPF 65 歲後基金。
3. A valid investment mandate for the DIS and / or each selected fund for either the mandatory contributions or the voluntary contributions must be, including but
not limited to: 強制性供款或自願性供款的預設投資策略及╱或每項所選基金的有效投資授權必須為，包括但不限於：
(i) each investment allocation percentage should be an integer and at least 5%, and 每項投資分配百分比須為整數及至少5%，及
(ii) all of the investment allocation percentages add up to 100% in total. 全部投資分配百分比的總和等於100%。
4. In the below events, transfer-in monies from another MPF scheme(s) or Occupational Retirement Scheme(s) ( "ORSO scheme(s)" ) for respective contribution
type(s) will be: 就下列情況，你由其他強積金計劃或職業退休計劃轉入之款項的相關供款類別將會：
(i) wholly invested in the DIS if: 全部根據預設投資策略進行投資，如：
a. you do not make any investment choice; or 你不作任何投資選擇；或
b. you do not give a valid, clear or complete investment mandate including but not limited to amendments which are not properly signed; or 你沒有提供有
效、清晰、完整的投資授權，包括但不限於更改位置旁沒有加簽作實；或
c. the total investment allocation percentage of the DIS and / or selected funds is over 100%; or 預設投資策略及╱或所選基金的投資分配百分比總和大於
100%；或
d. the instruction of the DIS and / or all selected funds is unclear or illegible. 預設投資策略及╱或全部所選基金指示不清晰或無法辨認。
(ii) partially ( i.e. the remaining percentage ) invested in the DIS if: 部分 ( 即剩餘的百分比 ) 根據預設投資策略進行投資，如：
a. the total investment allocation percentage of the DIS and / or selected funds is below 100%; or 預設投資策略及╱或所選基金的投資分配百分比總和少
於100%；或
b. the investment allocation percentage of the DIS and / or any selected funds is not an integer or less than 5%; or 預設投資策略及╱或任何所選基金的投
資分配百分比並非整數或少於5%；或
c. the instruction of the DIS and / or any selected funds is unclear or illegible. 預設投資策略及╱或任何所選基金指示不清晰或無法辨認。
5. You should note that investment markets could fluctuate significantly. Fund unit prices may go down as well as up. Please carefully consider your own risk
tolerance level and financial circumstances ( as well as your own retirement plan ) before making any investment choices. If in doubt, please contact your
financial advisor for further details. 你必須注意投資市場可能出現顯著的波動，基金單位價格可跌可升。在作出投資選擇前，你必須小心衡量個人可承受風險的
程度及財政狀況 ( 包括你的退休計劃 )。如有任何疑問，請諮詢你的財務顧問了解更多詳情。
6. The below investment mandate will not apply to any transfer-in asset in the form of unit transfer from another account in the same Scheme ( if any ). 下列投
資授權並不適用於由本計劃內的其他戶口以單位轉移形式轉入的資產 ( 如有 )。
7. Transfer-in monies from another registered scheme, Minimum MPF benefits ( "MMB" ) and / or accrued benefits other than MMB transferred from other ORSO
scheme(s) ( if any ) will be invested in mandatory contributions and / or voluntary contributions respectively in the following manner: 由另一註冊計劃轉入之款項、
由職業退休計劃轉入之最低強積金利益及╱或最低強積金利益以外的累算權益 ( 如有 ) 將分別根據下列強制性供款及╱或自願性供款比例進行投資：

Important Notes 重要事項 :
1. eMPF Platform Company Limited ( "eMPF Company" ), a wholly owned subsidiary of the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Authority General Terms
( "MPFA" ), will provide the scheme administration services to you through the eMPF Platform, subject to the "General Terms and and Conditions of
Conditions of the eMPF Platform" which can be accessed from https://empf.org.hk/tnc/en. 積金易平台有限公司 (「積金易公司」) 是強制 the eMPF Platform
積金易平台
性公積金計劃管理局 (「積金局」) 的全資附屬公司。積金易公司將根據「積金易平台一般條款及細則」( 可於 https://empf.org.hk/tnc 瀏覽 )，
一般條款及細則
透過積金易平台為你提供計劃行政服務。
2. Please read the following before completing this form: 填寫本表格前，請細閱以下部分：
(i) the MPF Scheme Brochure and the Key Scheme Information Document ( "KSID" ) of the Scheme. You can download the MPF Scheme Brochure
and the KSID by visiting the website of MPFA ( https://www.mpfa.org.hk/assets/OD/MT00482_Manulife_Global_Select_(MPF)_Scheme_EN.pdf )
or scanning the QR code as shown in Part A below; and 本計劃之強積金計劃說明書及主要計劃資料文件。你可透過瀏覽積金局的網
頁 ( https://www.mpfa.org.hk/assets/OD/MT00482_Manulife_Global_Select_(MPF)_Scheme_CH.pdf ) 或掃描於下列 A 部分所顯示的
二維碼下載強積金計劃說明書及主要計劃資料文件；及
(ii) Part D "Personal Information Collection Statement" ( "PICS" ) of the eMPF Platform and the Scheme; and D 部分積金易平台及本計劃《收集個人資料聲明》
(「聲明」)；及
(iii) the following Important Notes. 以下重要事項。
3. If the Member is in doubt about the contents of this form, the MPF Scheme Brochure, the KSID or the trust deed ( "Trust Deed" ) of the Scheme, the Member
should consult his / her solicitor, accountant or financial advisor. 如成員對本表格、本計劃之強積金計劃說明書、主要計劃資料文件或信託契約 ( 或稱信託契據 )
的內容有疑問，應該諮詢其律師、會計師或財務顧問。
4. Please complete this form in BLOCK LETTERS with black or blue pen and tick the appropriate box(es). 請用黑色或藍色筆以正楷填寫本表格，並在適當空格
內填上剔號。
5. Please countersign beside any amendment with the same signature as shown in Part E Authorization and Declaration. 如有刪改，請於更改位置旁加簽而該簽
署必須與E部分授權及聲明的簽署相符。
6. The eMPF Platform will process this enrolment upon receipt of this completed form and all relevant supporting document(s) ( if any ). If there are any
omissions ( including but not limited to missing page(s) / supporting document(s) ), the eMPF Platform may not be able to process this enrolment. 積金易平
台收到完整表格及相關證明文件( 如有 )後，才會處理有關登記。如有遺漏 ( 包括但不限於頁數╱證明文件不齊全 )，積金易平台可能未能執行此登記。
7. The member particulars, including but not limited to member name, identification document no., date of birth, residential address and correspondence
address, provided in Part A forms part of tax residency self-certification for an individual account holder specified in Part A below. 於本表格A部分提供的成員
資料，包括但不限於成員姓名、身分證明文件號碼、出生日期、居住地址及通訊地址，會成為下列A部分指明的個別人士帳戶持有人稅務居民身分自我證明的
一部分。
8. Information provided in this form will be updated by the eMPF Platform for the individual account holder specified in Part A for the purpose of Automatic
Exchange of Financial Account Information ( "AEOI" ) and Common Reporting Standard ( "CRS" ). The eMPF Platform will update the jurisdiction of tax
residency to all your MPF account(s) maintained in the eMPF Platform. 積金易平台會將本表格所提供的資料用作更新 A 部分指明的個別人士帳戶持有人自動
交換財務帳戶資料及「共同匯報標準」的用途。積金易平台將會更新你於積金易平台保存的所有強積金帳戶的稅務居民所在司法管轄區。

shall adopt 31 December as the Member's birthday. Likewise, if the Member's HKID Card contains only year and month but not the day of birth, the eMPF Platform shall adopt the last day of the
month as the birthday. If the Member leaves the month and / or day blank, the eMPF Platform shall follow the above rules to adopt the date of birth as the last day of that month or 31 December. 如
成員的香港身份證上只有出生年份，而成員沒有其他證件證明實際出生日期 ( 例如出生證明書或護照 )，積金易平台將以該年之12 月31 日作為成員的出生日期。同樣，如成員的香港身份證上只有

B. SELF-CERTIFICATION OF TAX RESIDENCY AND TAXPAYER IDENTIFICATION NUMBER OR ITS
FUNCTIONAL EQUIVALENT ( "TIN" ) 2
稅務居民身分自我證明及稅務編號或具有等同功能的識辨編號 (「稅務編號」) 2
• This is a self-certification provided by you to the Trustee for the purpose of Automatic Exchange of Financial Account Information ( "AEOI" ) in compliance
with tax law and regulations ( including but not limited to the Inland Revenue Ordinance ( Cap. 112 ) and regulations based on the Organisation for Economic
Cooperation and Development ( "OECD" ) Common Reporting Standard ( "CRS" ) for automatic exchange of information ). 這是你向受託人提供的自我證明，
以作自動交換財務帳戶資料用途以遵守稅務法律及規例 ( 包括但不限於《稅務條例》( 第112 章 ) 及根據自動交換資料有關的經濟合作與發展組織 (「OECD」)《共
同匯報標準》(「CRS」) 的規則 )。
• The information provided by you in this part will be updated by the eMPF Platform for all your MPF account(s) maintained in the eMPF Platform for the
purpose of AEOI and CRS. 你於本部分提供的資料將會更新你於積金易平台保存的所有強積金帳戶用作自動交換財務帳戶資料及「共同匯報標準」的用途。
• Each jurisdiction has its own rules for defining tax residence, and various jurisdictions provide information on how to determine if you are resident in that
particular jurisdiction for tax purposes. In general, you will find that your jurisdiction of tax residence is the jurisdiction / country in which you live. Special
circumstances may cause you to be resident elsewhere or resident in more than one jurisdiction / country at the same time ( dual residency ) for tax purposes.
For more information on jurisdiction of tax residence, please consult your tax adviser or the information at the OECD automatic exchange of information
portal ( http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/crs-implementation-and-assistance/tax-residency/ ). 每個稅務管轄區會按照其稅務法律訂定稅務居民
的定義，並提供相關資料讓你判定是否屬某一稅務管轄區的稅務居民。一般而言，你的稅務居留司法管轄區╱國家會根據你的居住地點而定，因此，如你有多
於一處居所 ( 雙重居住地 )，你可能會同時成為多個稅務管轄區╱國家的稅務居民。有關稅務居民身分的更多資訊，請諮詢你的稅務顧問或瀏覽OECD的自動
交換資料網頁 ( http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/crs-implementation-and-assistance/tax-residency/ ) 。
• If you are tax resident in a reportable jurisdiction3 of Hong Kong, you will be classified as a reportable person for AEOI, the Trustee will be legally obliged to
pass on the information provided in this self-certification and other financial information with respect to your account(s) to the Hong Kong Inland Revenue
Department ( "IRD" ), and they will transmit this information to the tax authorities of which you are tax resident. 如你的稅務居民所在地屬香港申報稅務管轄區3，
你將會被界定為自動交換資料下的申報對象，受託人在法律上有義務將你於本自我證明申報的資料，你財務帳戶有關的某些財務資料轉交予香港稅務局，而相
關資料或會與你作為稅務居民所屬的稅務機關交換。
• The member particulars, including but not limited to member name, identification document no., date of birth, residential address and correspondence
address, provided in Part A forms part of this self-certification. 於A部分提供的成員資料，包括但不限於成員姓名、身分證明文件號碼、出生日期、居住地址及
通訊地址，會成為本自我證明的一部分。
• This self-certification will remain valid unless there is any change in circumstances relating to information that makes this self-certification incorrect, inaccurate
or incomplete. You must notify the eMPF Platform / the Trustee and provide an updated self-certification within 30 days of such change in circumstances. 除
非情況有所改變而引致已提交的自我證明上的資料不正確、不準確或不完整，否則該已提交的自我證明仍具十足效力。如情況有所改變，你務必通知積金易平
台╱受託人，並需要在發生改變後30 天內向積金易平台╱受託人提供一份已更新的自我證明。
• The eMPF Platform MUST obtain the complete and valid tax residency self-certification for the setting up of member account. To avoid any delay in the setting up
of member account and contribution settlement ( if any ), please read and complete all the appropriate parts below. 積金易平台在開立成員帳戶前，必須取得完整
及有效的稅務居民身分自我證明。為避免成員帳戶開立及供款處理( 如有 )有任何延誤，請細閱並完成以下所有適用部分。
• The eMPF Platform / The Trustee has right to require you to provide all relevant identification / verification documentation. Failure in providing the information
and other personal data as requested may result in your application / instruction not being able to be processed. 積金易平台╱受託人有權要求你提供所有相
關的身分證明╱驗證文件。如未能提供所需資料及其他個人資料，可能導致你的申請╱指示不獲處理。
• Kindly note that the eMPF Platform / the Trustee is not allowed to offer any tax or legal advice to you. For tax- OECD-CRS IRD稅務局
related questions, please consult your tax adviser or visit the OECD ( http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-
exchange/crs-implementation-and-assistance/ ) and IRD's AEOI website ( http://www.ird.gov.hk/eng/tax/dta_aeoi.htm ),
or simply scan the QR code, for more CRS and related information. 請注意積金易平台╱受託人不獲允許向你提供
稅務或法律意見。任何稅務相關的疑問，請詢問專業稅務顧問或瀏覽OECD ( http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-
exchange/crs-implementation-and-assistance/ ) 及稅務局 ( http://www.ird.gov.hk/chi/tax/dta_aeoi.htm ) 有關自動
交換財務帳戶資料的網頁，或掃描此二維碼，以獲取更多CRS 及相關資料。
• For the terms and expressions in this part, please refer to https://www.ird.gov.hk/eng/pdf/2016/terms.pdf. 請參考https://www.ird.gov.hk/chi/pdf/2016/terms.pdf
以查閱本部分的名詞及措辭釋義。

C.INVESTMENT MANDATE 投資授權
Please read the following before completing Part C. 於填寫C部分前，請閱讀以下事項。
1. You can choose to invest your contributions ( including transfer-in monies ) in the Default Investment Strategy ( "DIS" ) and / or any constituent funds.
However, if you do not wish to make any investment choice, you do not have to do so. In the event of no investment choice or no valid investment mandate is
provided, all contributions ( including transfer-in monies ) will be invested in accordance with the DIS. 你可選擇將你的供款 ( 包括轉入之款項 ) 投資於預設投資
策略及╱或任何成分基金。但是，如你不想作出任何投資選擇，可無須這樣做。如沒有作出投資選擇或沒有提交有效的投資授權，所有供款 ( 包括轉入之款項 )
將按照預設投資策略進行投資。
2. DIS is a default investment arrangement as stipulated in accordance with the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Ordinance. The DIS is invested in the Core
Accumulation Fund ▲ and the Age 65 Plus Fund ▽ according to the pre-set allocation percentages at different ages and will adjust risk by way of reducing the
holding in the Core Accumulation Fund ▲ and increasing the holding in the Age 65 Plus Fund ▽ after the Member reaches 50 years of age. For more details on
de-risking of the DIS, please refer to the MPF Scheme Brochure and the KSID of the Scheme. 預設投資策略是一項根據《強制性公積金計劃條例》規定的預設
投資安排。預設投資策略透過於不同年齡按照預定配置百分比來投資於核心累積基金▲與65歲後基金▽及會隨著成員年滿50歲後以減持核心累積基金▲及增持
65歲後基金▽來調整風險。有關預設投資策略降低風險機制的詳情，可參閱本計劃之強積金計劃說明書及主要計劃資料文件。
▲ It refers to the Manulife MPF Core Accumulation Fund of the Scheme. 即本計劃的宏利 MPF 核心累積基金。
▽ It refers to the Manulife MPF Age 65 Plus Fund of the Scheme. 即本計劃的宏利 MPF 65 歲後基金。
3. A valid investment mandate for the DIS and / or each selected fund for either the mandatory contributions or the voluntary contributions must be, including but
not limited to: 強制性供款或自願性供款的預設投資策略及╱或每項所選基金的有效投資授權必須為，包括但不限於：
(i) each investment allocation percentage should be an integer and at least 5%, and 每項投資分配百分比須為整數及至少5%，及
(ii) all of the investment allocation percentages add up to 100% in total. 全部投資分配百分比的總和等於100%。
4. In the below events, contributions made and / or transfer-in monies from another MPF scheme(s) or Occupational Retirement Scheme(s) ( "ORSO scheme(s)" )
for respective contribution type(s) will be: 就下列情況，你作出的供款及╱或由其他強積金計劃或職業退休計劃轉入之款項的相關供款類別將會：
(i) wholly invested in the DIS if: 全部根據預設投資策略進行投資，如：
a.you do not make any investment choice; or 你不作任何投資選擇；或
b.you do not give a valid, clear or complete investment mandate including but not limited to amendments which are not properly signed; or 你沒有提供有
效、清晰、完整的投資授權，包括但不限於更改位置旁沒有加簽作實；或
c. the total investment allocation percentage of the DIS and / or selected funds is over 100%; or 預設投資策略及╱或所選基金的投資分配百分比總和大於
100%；或
d.the instruction of the DIS and / or all selected funds is unclear or illegible. 預設投資策略及╱或全部所選基金指示不清晰或無法辨認。
(ii) partially ( i.e. the remaining percentage ) invested in the DIS if: 部分 ( 即剩餘的百分比 ) 根據預設投資策略進行投資，如：
a.the total investment allocation percentage of the DIS and / or selected funds is below 100%; or 預設投資策略及╱或所選基金的投資分配百分比總和少於
100%；或
b.the investment allocation percentage of the DIS and / or any selected funds is not an integer or less than 5%; or 預設投資策略及╱或任何所選基金的投
資分配百分比並非整數或少於5%；或
c. the instruction of the DIS and / or any selected funds is unclear or illegible. 預設投資策略及╱或任何所選基金指示不清晰或無法辨認。
5. You should note that investment markets could fluctuate significantly. Fund unit prices may go down as well as up. Please carefully consider your own risk
tolerance level and financial circumstances ( as well as your own retirement plan ) before making any investment choices. If in doubt, please contact your
financial advisor for further details. 你必須注意投資市場可能出現顯著的波動，基金單位價格可跌可升。在作出投資選擇前，你必須小心衡量個人可承受風險的
程度及財政狀況 ( 包括你的退休計劃 ) 。如有任何疑問，請諮詢你的財務顧問了解更多詳情。
6. The below investment mandate will not apply to any transfer-in asset in the form of unit transfer from another account in the same Scheme ( if any ). 下列投
資授權並不適用於由本計劃內的其他戶口以單位轉移形式轉入的資產 ( 如有 )。
7. Contributions, transfer-in monies from another registered scheme, Minimum MPF benefits ( "MMB" ) and / or accrued benefits other than MMB transferred
from other ORSO scheme(s) ( if any ) will be invested in mandatory contributions and / or voluntary contributions respectively in the following manner: 供款、
由另一註冊計劃轉入之款項、由職業退休計劃轉入之最低強積金利益及╱或最低強積金利益以外的累算權益 ( 如有 ) 將分別根據下列強制性供款及╱或自願性供

• Each jurisdiction has its own rules for defining tax residence, and various jurisdictions provide information on how to determine if you are resident in that
particular jurisdiction for tax purposes. In general, you will find that your jurisdiction of tax residence is the jurisdiction / country in which you live. Special
circumstances may cause you to be resident elsewhere or resident in more than one jurisdiction / country at the same time ( dual residency ) for tax
purposes. For more information on jurisdiction of tax residence, please consult your tax adviser or the information at the OECD automatic exchange of
information portal ( http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/crs-implementation-and-assistance/tax-residency/ ). 每個稅務管轄區會按照其稅務法律訂
